name: Juro Compliance Scanner
description: Non-custodial GDPR, DORA, and DPDP compliance scanner for public URLs. Produces signed, deterministic findings. Tier 1 (hosted scanning) only.

tools.name: scan_url
tools.description: Scan a public URL for GDPR, DORA, and DPDP compliance issues. Returns posture score and detailed findings.

tools.name: get_posture_score
tools.description: Get posture score only for a domain. Fast — use for a quick compliance check.

tools.name: list_regulations
tools.description: List regulations Juro covers: GDPR (EU+UK), DORA (EU), DPDP (India).

tools.name: get_finding_detail
tools.description: Get regulatory citation and remediation guidance for a specific rule ID.

constraints: Public URLs only. No customer infrastructure data.
Tier 1 hosted scanning only. For Tier 3 Private Deploy, contact team@jurocompliant.com.
No banned compliance claims: not SOC 2 certified, not ISO 27001 certified.
